reviews.comment:
Atienden bien. El único problema que tiene es que se junta mucha gente y no están muy organizados para eso.

(Translated by Google)
They provide good service. The only problem is that it gets very crowded and they're not very organized to handle it.

reviews.comment:
El mejor lugar para cargar combustible, es el unico lugar donde la calidad esta intacta y donde no te roban, yo cargo con confianza siempre ahi, sea en al ACA que sea, ademas siendo socio accedes a un 5%  de descuento en combustible y un 10% en aceites y el mercadito (Full)
RECOMEDABLE

(Translated by Google)
The best place to fill up! It's the only place where the quality is consistently excellent and where you won't get ripped off. I always fill up there with confidence, no matter which ACA station I'm at. Plus, as a member, you get a 5% discount on fuel and 10% off oils and the convenience store (Full).
Highly recommended!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNZLV8zNkJnEAE
